title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Scootsy

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Scootsy
jsonLd.description:
We at Scootsy are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scootsy:
Scootsy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
